title: Route and group in Alertmanager
description: Group related alerts, route by severity and team, and use inhibition to suppress downstream noise.
body: Use when many alerts can fire together for one underlying incident. Do not send every alert as a separate page — an incident then becomes an unreadable storm. Actions: group alerts by a shared label set, route by severity and owning team, and add inhibition rules so a higher-level outage suppresses its dependent alerts. Validation signals include one incident producing a grouped notification and inhibited child alerts staying silent. Risk boundary: an over-broad inhibition or silence can hide an unrelated real alert — scope inhibition narrowly and treat blanket silences as needing review.
